mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS approval_id, a.request_id, a.request_type, a.applicant_id, a.current_step, a.total_steps, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.reason, a.created_at AS submitted_at FROM wf_approval_step s INNER JOIN wf_approval a ON a.id = s.approval_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN att_request r ON r.id = a.request_id AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.status = 'PENDING' AND a.status = 'PENDING' AND r.status = 'PENDING' AND s.step = a.current_step AND ((a.escalated = 0 AND s.approver_id = #{approverId}) OR (a.escalated = 1 AND a.escalated_to = #{approverId})) ORDER BY a.created_at ASC, a.id ASC
